channel.title: wordpress on Have an average day :|
channel.description: Recent content in wordpress on Have an average day :|

item.title: Updated Wordpress & Commenting
item.description: I updated to the new release of WordPress, Jetpack, and Social Login. You can now logon with more services and because of the new Jetpack commenting I’ve disabled disqus for the time being. It’s easier to approve and reply to comments using Jetpack.
